creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Pass --vo=xv or --vo=x11 explicitly. --vo=gpu (default) and --vo=gpu-next should gracefully failover when GPU lacks OpenGL/Vulkan drivers (llvmpipe/lavapipe are rejected) but maybe not when GPU drivers are broken/incomplete.

Report upstream. From downstream POV having a workaround is enough.
